# connectracer_connect_ai_agent (Resource)

Manages an Amazon Q in Connect AI Agent resource.

AI Agents allow you to configure how Amazon Q in Connect processes queries and generates answers, including manual search, answer recommendation, and self-service configurations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# AI Agent for Answer Recommendation
resource "connectracer_connect_ai_agent" "answer_recommendation" {
  assistant_id      = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
  name              = "answer-recommendation-agent"
  type              = "ANSWER_RECOMMENDATION"
  visibility_status = "PUBLISHED"
  description       = "AI Agent for answer recommendations"
  create_version    = true

  answer_recommendation_configuration {
    answer_generation_ai_prompt_id          = "aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee"
    intent_labeling_generation_ai_prompt_id = "ffffffff-1111-2222-3333-444444444444"
    query_reformulation_ai_prompt_id        = "55555555-6666-7777-8888-999999999999"
    locale                                  = "de_DE"

    association_configurations {
      association_id   = "abcdefab-1234-5678-abcd-123456789012"
      association_type = "KNOWLEDGE_BASE"

      knowledge_base_configuration {
        max_results                         = 5
        override_knowledge_base_search_type = "HYBRID"
      }
    }
  }

  tags = {
    Environment = "production"
  }
}

# AI Agent for Manual Search
resource "connectracer_connect_ai_agent" "manual_search" {
  assistant_id      = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
  name              = "manual-search-agent"
  type              = "MANUAL_SEARCH"
  visibility_status = "SAVED"
  description       = "AI Agent for manual search"

  manual_search_configuration {
    answer_generation_ai_prompt_id = "aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee"
    locale                         = "en_US"

    association_configurations {
      association_id   = "abcdefab-1234-5678-abcd-123456789012"
      association_type = "KNOWLEDGE_BASE"

      knowledge_base_configuration {
        max_results                         = 10
        override_knowledge_base_search_type = "SEMANTIC"
      }
    }
  }
}

# AI Agent for Self Service
resource "connectracer_connect_ai_agent" "self_service" {
  assistant_id      = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
  name              = "self-service-agent"
  type              = "SELF_SERVICE"
  visibility_status = "PUBLISHED"
  description       = "AI Agent for self-service"
  create_version    = true

  self_service_configuration {
    self_service_answer_generation_ai_prompt_id = "aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee"
    self_service_pre_processing_ai_prompt_id    = "ffffffff-1111-2222-3333-444444444444"

    association_configurations {
      association_id   = "abcdefab-1234-5678-abcd-123456789012"
      association_type = "KNOWLEDGE_BASE"

      knowledge_base_configuration {
        max_results                         = 5
        override_knowledge_base_search_type = "HYBRID"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `assistant_id` (String) The identifier of the Amazon Q in Connect assistant
- `name` (String) The name of the AI Agent
- `type` (String) The type of the AI Agent. Valid values: `MANUAL_SEARCH`, `ANSWER_RECOMMENDATION`, `SELF_SERVICE`
- `visibility_status` (String) The visibility status of the AI Agent. Valid values: `SAVED`, `PUBLISHED`

### Optional

- `answer_recommendation_configuration` (Block List) Configuration for answer recommendation AI agent type (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--answer_recommendation_configuration))
- `create_version` (Boolean) Whether to create a version of the AI Agent after creation/update. Defaults to `false`
- `description` (String) The description of the AI Agent
- `manual_search_configuration` (Block List) Configuration for manual search AI agent type (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--manual_search_configuration))
- `self_service_configuration` (Block List) Configuration for self-service AI agent type (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--self_service_configuration))
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to apply to the AI Agent

### Read-Only

- `ai_agent_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AI Agent
- `assistant_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Q in Connect assistant
- `id` (String) The identifier of the AI Agent
- `modified_time` (String) The time the AI Agent was last modified (RFC3339 format)
- `origin` (String) The origin of the AI Agent
- `qualified_id` (String) The AI Agent ID with version qualifier appended (e.g., `id:version_number`). Use this to reference the agent from other resources
- `status` (String) The status of the AI Agent
- `version_number` (Number) The version number of the AI Agent (populated when `create_version` is true)

<a id="nestedblock--answer_recommendation_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `answer_recommendation_configuration`

Optional:

- `answer_generation_ai_guardrail_id` (String) The AI Guardrail ID for answer generation
- `answer_generation_ai_prompt_id` (String) The AI Prompt ID for answer generation
- `association_configurations` (Block List) Association configurations for knowledge bases (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--answer_recommendation_configuration--association_configurations))
- `intent_labeling_generation_ai_prompt_id` (String) The AI Prompt ID for intent labeling generation
- `locale` (String) The locale for the configuration
- `query_reformulation_ai_prompt_id` (String) The AI Prompt ID for query reformulation

<a id="nestedblock--answer_recommendation_configuration--association_configurations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `answer_recommendation_configuration.association_configurations`

Required:

- `association_id` (String) The identifier of the association (knowledge base ID)
- `association_type` (String) The type of the association. Valid values: `KNOWLEDGE_BASE`

Optional:

- `knowledge_base_configuration` (Block List) Knowledge base association configuration data (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--answer_recommendation_configuration--association_configurations--knowledge_base_configuration))

<a id="nestedblock--answer_recommendation_configuration--association_configurations--knowledge_base_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `answer_recommendation_configuration.association_configurations.knowledge_base_configuration`

Optional:

- `max_results` (Number) The maximum number of results to return from the knowledge base
- `override_knowledge_base_search_type` (String) Override the knowledge base search type. Valid values: `HYBRID`, `SEMANTIC`




<a id="nestedblock--manual_search_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `manual_search_configuration`

Optional:

- `answer_generation_ai_guardrail_id` (String) The AI Guardrail ID for answer generation
- `answer_generation_ai_prompt_id` (String) The AI Prompt ID for answer generation
- `association_configurations` (Block List) Association configurations for knowledge bases (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--manual_search_configuration--association_configurations))
- `locale` (String) The locale for the configuration

<a id="nestedblock--manual_search_configuration--association_configurations"></a>

- `self_service_answer_generation_ai_prompt_id` (String) The AI Prompt ID for self-service answer generation
